title: Funimation Releases Dubbed Trailer
wikitext:
[]: Funimation Releases Dubbed Trailer Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 14, 2009 10:35 am IN THIS THREAD: you spew your dub love, and nowhere else in the forum.

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Sun Jun 14, 2009 10:48 am I like Allison Keith. Her voice is the sex. Enough love spew?

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 14, 2009 10:51 am Keith is an awesome Misato, yes.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Jun 14, 2009 10:55 am I like Allison's Misato. Doesn't quite sound the same as in the original series though, I hope it's because it's only the trailer. Spike's Shinji still sounds great! I might have to adjust to the new voice for Ritsuko. John Swasey's Gendo didn't sound like how it did in the DC episodes. I hope it's only because it's the trailer also.

[]: Post by ZapX » Sun Jun 14, 2009 10:56 am You already said that in the other thread. You don't get to talk about the dub anymore.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Jun 14, 2009 10:59 am Forgot about that. My apologies.

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Sun Jun 14, 2009 11:00 am Yes, and now he's saying it in the dubwank thread. Also generic opinion #2: Black Hyuga was funny.

[]: Post by Axell » Sun Jun 14, 2009 11:11 am eeewwwwww

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 14, 2009 11:14 am Zap: Then why was this thread made?

[]: Post by skikes » Sun Jun 14, 2009 1:02 pm hmmm... really very underwhelming :/ i love the original dub but for rebuild i really wish they had have gotten an entirely new cast. i wanna see something fresh, a new take on the characters. I mean its a reboot, the only returning actors are for Misato and Shinji... wouldn't it have seemed odd if they gave the role of the joker to jack nicholson in the dark knight? i think im jumping the gun a little. ill reserve my opinion until i see the entire movie.

[]: Post by Combs » Sun Jun 14, 2009 3:28 pm Yes, Toji, Ritsuko, Kensuke, all have improved voice actors. I'm glad I won't be hearing a whiney Ritsuko. Rei is going to take some getting used too. She will sound a bit more whispy. Why the fuck no robin williams as Gendo? He's an A-list celebrity and would boost the films popularity exponentially. Funimation AT LEAST was smart enough not to cast sue ulu.

[]: Post by Master Raven » Sun Jun 14, 2009 3:29 pm Allison Keith sounds good. Ritsuko sounds good. Shinji ehhh never cared much for Spike Spencer but it's alright. Gendo sounds alright, might take time for it to grow on me.

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Sun Jun 14, 2009 3:41 pm Who the hell says that voice is Gendo. We don't know that, you don't know that. It's just a cheesy voice over for the trailer, along with the cheesy background music that is generic and not in the film.

[]: Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun Jun 14, 2009 4:36 pm Everything seems good but is that really Eva 01, sounds pretty monster-ish which I guess is not that wrong.

[]: Post by Lagann » Sun Jun 14, 2009 5:21 pm Did this seem like 1.11 to anybody else? It looks lighter than 1.0.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Jun 14, 2009 6:26 pm Dub sucks my mushy, lactose intolerant turds. So does this thread.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 14, 2009 7:01 pm Huh. I didn't realize Zap had already posted mention of the Dub trailer: http://www.evageeks.org/2009/06/evangelion-1-0-dub-showing-in-70-theaters/ That will teach me to only read post titles.

[]: Post by backseatjesus » Sun Jun 14, 2009 7:21 pm Allison's Misato sounds better than ever.

[]: Post by Eva 04 » Sun Jun 14, 2009 8:29 pm I'm glad they brought back two of the original VA's from the series.IMO,rebuild wouldnt be evangelion if they didnt at least bring back one original VA.

[]: Post by Master Raven » Sun Jun 14, 2009 8:50 pm Allison Keith is pretty rad now. She's come a long way.
